popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Adalbert III, Count of Namur, b abt 1035, Namur, Belgium, d 1102. He md Ida Billung of Saxony abt 1060, daughter of Bernard II, Duke of Saxony, and Elica von Schweinfurt. Children of Adalbert III and …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Albert III de Namur於1035年8月10日出生在比利時迪瑟 德 納姆爾時，他的父親Albert II de Namur38歲，母親Regelindis de Lorraine41歲。他於1065年與Ida von Sachsen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1102年6月22日在比利時納姆爾享年66歲，埋葬在比利時納姆爾沙吉奧賓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albert III de Namur于1035年8月10日出生在比利时迪瑟 德 納姆爾时，他的父亲Albert II de Namur38岁，母亲Regelindis de Lorraine41岁。他于1065年与Ida von Sachsen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1102年6月22日在比利时納姆爾享年66岁，埋葬在比利时納姆爾沙吉奧賓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Albert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Albert III de Namur was born on 10 August 1035, in Namur, Belgium, his father, Albert II de Namur, was 38 and his mother, Regelindis de Lorraine, was 41. He married Ida von Sachsen in 1065. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 June 1102, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Saint-Aubin, Namur, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albert III de Namur est né le 10 août 1035, à Diocèse de Namur, Belgique, son père, Albert II de Namur, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Regelindis de Lorraine, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Ida von Sachsen en 1065. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 juin 1102, à Namur, Belgique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Aubin, Namur, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albert III de Namur am 10. August 1035 in Bistum Namur, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albert II de Namur 38 und seine Mutter Regelindis de Lorraine 41. Er hat 1065 Ida von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Juni 1102 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Namen, Belgien und wurde in Saint-Aubin, Namen, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albert III de Namur è nato il il 10 agosto 1035 nel Diocèse de Namur, Belgio, il suo padre, Albert II de Namur, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Regelindis de Lorraine, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Ida von Sachsen nel 1065. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 giugno 1102, nel Namur, Belgio, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Aubin, Namur, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Albert III de Namurが1035年8月10日にベルギーディオクeゼ ド ナムルで生まれた時，父Albert II de Namurは38歳，母Regelindis de Lorraineは41歳であった。1065年にIda von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1102年6月22日にベルギーナムルで66歳で死去し，ベルギーナムルサイント-アウビンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Albert III de Namur(이)가 1035년 8월 10일 벨기에 디오ce스 데 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert II de Namur(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Regelindis de Lorraine(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1065년 Ida von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1102년 6월 22일 벨기에 남어에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 남어 세인트-오빈에 묻혔다.

mn.10 August 1035–22 June 1102: 1035 оны Наймдугаар сарын 10–1102 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 22

pt.10 August 1035–22 June 1102: 10 de agosto de 1035–22 de junho de 1102
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albert III de Namur nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1035, em Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Albert II de Namur, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Regelindis de Lorraine, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida von Sachsen em 1065. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de junho de 1102, em Namur, Bélgica, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Aubin, Namur, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albert III de Namur родился 10 августа 1035 г. в местности диокeс де намур, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Albert II de Namur было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Regelindis de Lorraine, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida von Sachsen в 1065 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 июня 1102 г. в местности намур, Бельгия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-аубин, намур, Бельгия.

es.10 August 1035–22 June 1102: 10 de agosto de 1035–22 de junio de 1102
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albert III de Namur nació el 10 de agosto de 1035, en Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Albert II de Namur, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Regelindis de Lorraine, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Ida von Sachsen en 1065. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de junio de 1102, en Namur, Bélgica, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Aubin, Namur, Bélgica.
